name: Apify Tester MCP Client
what_it_does: Official Apify MCP testing client enabling developers to test and validate MCP servers — sending tool calls, inspecting responses, validating tool schemas, and debugging MCP server implementations, integrating comprehensive MCP server testing into development and CI/CD workflows.
use_cases: Testing MCP server tool implementations during development
Validating MCP tool schemas and response formats from QA agents
Debugging MCP server behavior from development agents
Integration testing MCP servers in CI/CD pipelines
Verifying MCP server compatibility with MCP spec from validation agents
Automated regression testing of MCP tool behavior from testing agents
not_for: Production MCP server use (this is a testing/development client tool)
End users of MCP servers (for developers building MCP servers)
MCP client development (this tests servers, not clients)
best_when: An MCP server developer needs to test and validate their server implementation — official Apify testing client provides comprehensive MCP protocol testing.
avoid_when: You're an end user of MCP servers rather than a developer building them.

auth.notes: Client-side testing tool — no auth required for the tool itself. Auth depends on the MCP server being tested.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free and open source testing tool
pricing.notes: Free open source MCP testing client from Apify. Official tool for MCP server development.

performance.rate_limits: Local — depends on server under test

known_agent_gotchas: This is an MCP CLIENT, not an MCP server — for testing servers, not for agent use
Requires target MCP server to be running and accessible
Official Apify tool but focused on Apify's testing patterns
Test scripts/configurations must be written to match target server's tool schema
Not designed for automated agent-driven workflows — primarily developer tooling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local testing client. No credentials needed for tool itself. Official Apify tool. Test server credentials handled per-server. No external data exposure.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local testing client. No credentials. Official Apify tool. No data exposure.
